since_last: 82% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +4.74%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 82% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.65% · BTC +0.59% · Gold +1.68% · Nasdaq100 +1.38%. 82% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +4.74%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +4.74%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.37%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ARM is the standout at +10.53%
cards.body: Leaders: ARM +10.53%, SYNA +7.83%, LRCX +6.77%, HPE +6.72%, LSCC +6.70%. Laggards: AVAV -5.18%, PLTR -4.00%, SOUN -3.53%, IBM -2.50%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.17% at $150.03
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.17% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
